Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) The compartment identifier that owns the transcription job.
  • input_location - (Required) Source audio input location for the job.
  • output_location - (Required) Destination location for transcription outputs.
  • display_name - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name for the job.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) A short description of the transcription job.
  • additional_transcription_formats - (Optional) Additional output formats for the transcription result.
  • model_details - (Optional) Model selection details for the transcription request.
  • normalization - (Optional) Normalization and filtering options for the transcription output.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Simple key-value tags applied to the transcription job.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags applied to the transcription job.
